identity.name: Infinit-Audit
identity.tone: Clinical Utility meets Modern SaaS. Trustworthy, Efficient, Precise, yet Human.
identity.vibe: Sterile but not cold. The cleanliness of a high-end kitchen meets the precision of a Swiss watch.

rules.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-800 dark:text-slate-100
rules.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-500

primary.description: Teal-700. The core brand color. Trust, Safety, Infinity.

secondary.description: Sky-500. For accents, active states, and highlights.

surface.description: Pure White / Slate-900. Cards and panels.

gradients.glass: bg-white/70 dark:bg-slate-900/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10

strategies.dashboard_mode: Control Room Grid. Dense data, high scanability.
strategies.form_mode: Split View. Questions on left (col-span-8), Context/Settings on right (col-span-4).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 text-slate-900 dark:text-white border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-slate-700 h-10 px-6 rounded-md font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white h-10 px-4 rounded-md transition-all

cards.base: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 transition-all

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use for sticky headers and floating action bars. Class: 'backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 dark:bg-slate-950/80 border-b border-slate-200/50 dark:border-slate-800/50'
visual_enhancers.noise: Add a subtle noise texture to the sidebar background to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: On 'Run Audit' active cards, use a subtle animated border gradient to indicate progress.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Use 'shadow-sm' for static elements, 'shadow-lg' for dropdowns/modals. Avoid heavy shadows in dark mode.

assets.icons: Lucide React (Default). Use Phosphor Icons for specific audit actions if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a high-precision tool. Precision is key. Alignments must be perfect. Spacing must be consistent.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_toggle: Implement a ThemeProvider using 'next-themes' or similar logic. Default to 'system' or 'light'.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: For the 'Create Audit' page, do NOT use a simple vertical list. Use a 'Builder' layout: Sidebar for tools/question types, Main area for the form canvas.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile: Ensure the 'Run Audit' page is 100% mobile-optimized. Large touch targets for Pass/Fail buttons. Photo upload must be seamless.
instructions_to_main_agent.charts: Use Recharts for the Reports placeholder. Keep them simple: Bar charts for Pass/Fail rates.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use 'framer-motion' for page transitions and list entrance animations. Stagger the appearance of audit items.

do_not: Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings.
Do not center text in data tables.
Do not use 'alert()' for errors. Use 'Sonner' toasts.
must_do: Handle loading states with skeletons, not spinners.
